name: Suprise assault! Mutante homes destroyed
setup_text: Place 4 Unexhausted Haven Tokens (Source) as shown on map below. Set aside 4 Mutant tokens (Civilian).
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each character they control that is holding a Mutant during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules:
Interact (Haven): Flip this Haven and pick up a Mutant from it. Mutants are Limited. A character annot Interact with a Haven while is holding a Mutant.

Flee!: During the Cleanup Phase, remove all Mutants from the Game and Flip each Exhausted Haven.

name: Infinity Formula Goes Missing!
setup_text: Place 4 Serum Canister tokens (Point of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Serum Canister they Secure during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules: During the Power Phase, characters Contesting a Serum Canister gain 1 POWER.

name: Super-Powered Scoundrels form sinister Syndicate
setup_text: Place 5 Ambush tokens (Points of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Ambush they Secure during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules: Characters contesting an Ambush have Cover from characters not Contesting the same Ambush.

name: Research Station Attacked!
setup_text: Place 1 Researcher token (Civilian) and 2 Evac Points (Assets) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: A player scores 2 VPs if they are securing the Researcher during the Cleanup Phase. Then they score 1 additional VP if the Researcher is within RANGE 1 of their Evac Point.
special_rules:
During the Power Phase, the Researcher may move. If a player is securing the Researcher, they may Place it within RANGE 2 of its current location.

The Evac Point farthest from a player's battlefield edge is their Evac Point.

name: Demons downtown! Has our comeuppance come due?
setup_text: Place 3 Flaming Portal tokens (Point of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Flaming Portal they are Securing during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules: During the Power Phase, characters within RANGE 1 of a Flaming Portal gain the Incinerate special condition.

name: Gamma Wave Sweeps Across Midwest
setup_text: Place 3 Gamma Shelter tokens (Point of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for Securing their Close, 1 VP for the Mid, and 2 VPs for Securing their Far Gamma Shelter during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules:
during the Cleanup Phase, each character that is not within RANGE 2 of a Gamma Shelter suffers 1 WOUND.

The Gamma Shelter closest to a player's battlefield edge is their Close Shelter. The Gamma Shelter in the center is both player's Mid Shelter. The Gamma Shelter farthest from a pleyr's battlefield edge is their Far Shelter.

name: Intrusions Open Across city as seals collapse
setup_text: Place 3 Dark Portal tokens (Point of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Dark Portal they Secure during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules: Interact (Dark Portal): This character drops all objective tokens it is holding. Then roll 1 die. If the result is a CRIT, WILD, HIT, or DEFENSE, Place this character within RANGE 1 of another Dark Portal. Otherwise, the opposing player Places this character within RANGE 1 of another Dark Portal.

name: Guardians Save Shi'ar Empress in Style
setup_text: Place 4 Security Terminal tokens (Point of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Secury Terminal they Control during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules:
Interact (Security Terminal): Roll 3 dice. If the roll contains more CRIT, WILD, or HIT results than the number of Healthy enemy characters Contesting this Security Terminal, you now Control this Security Terminal.

If a character is holding one or more Extract objective tokens, it may reroll 1 die when interacting with a Security Terminal.

name: Survivors Search for Safe Shelters
setup_text: Place 3 Shelter tokens (Point of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Shelter they Secure during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules: When a character Contesting a Shelter is targeted by an attack, 1 other allied character that is also Contesting that Shelter may spend 1 POWER. If it does, the defender adds 1 die to its defense roll. A character can add dice to its roll in this way only once per Turn.
